{{- /* Include a markdown snippet to a page and render it Usage: {{% include "path/to/snippet.md" %}} The path is relative to content/_snippets */ -}} {{- with .Get 0 }} {{- with site.GetPage (add "/_snippets/" .) }} {{- .RenderShortcodes }} {{- else }} {{- errorf "Shortcode [ %s ] snippet [ %s ] not found at [ %s ]" $.Name . $.Position }} {{- end }} {{- else }} {{- errorf "Shortcode [ %s ]: snippet [ %s ] not found at [ %s ]" $.Name . $.Position }} {{- end }} {{- /**/ -}}
